title: Shulker Eggs
description: A throwable egg for capturing mobs in item form.
body:
Shulker Eggs are a semi-balanced way to transport mobs in survival mode!

You can throw Shulker Eggs at mobs to capture them, but every egg doesn't guarantee a capture! The more health a mob has, the greater a chance there is for the capture to fail! Deal more damage to increase your chances of successfully capturing a mob!

## Recipe
![An Egg between two Shulker Shells](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Yn7dSYjr/images/40153487d0bb90ca124c2e8296736fb678dd3b62.png)

## Configuration
The default chance you have of capturing a full-health mob can be configured by using the following command and entering a number between 0 and 100 (representing a percentage). The default value is 25, meaning full-health mobs have a 25% chance of being captured.

```
/scoreboard players set #default_capture_chance shulker_egg 25
```
